name: easy-dotnet.nvim
description: A fully self-contained Neovim plugin for .NET development. Ships with integrated Roslyn LSP and netcoredbg debugging, offering fast, dependency-free setup and smooth build/test workflows for C# across .NET Core and .NET Framework.
description_ja: 完全自己完結型の.NET開発向けNeovimプラグイン。Roslyn LSPとnetcoredbgデバッグを統合し、高速で依存関係のないセットアップと、.NET Coreおよび.NET Framework全体にわたるC#のビルド・テストワークフローを提供。
